summary: Frontend-only testing of Worker App mobile pages integration. Verified route protection, navigation structure, and code quality.

issues: Non-critical: @import statements in index.css should precede @tailwind directives for proper CSS ordering. This causes Vite warnings but doesn't break functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: All worker routes (/worker, /worker/check-in, /worker/notes) are correctly defined in App.tsx
WorkerLayout component properly implements bottom navigation with active tab highlighting based on current route
WorkerHome.tsx correctly navigates to /worker/check-in and /worker/notes via quick action cards and bottom nav
WorkerCheckIn.tsx and WorkerNotes.tsx both use WorkerLayout for consistent UI
Route protection working correctly - all worker routes redirect to /login when not authenticated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Worker mobile pages integration verified. Routes /worker, /worker/check-in, /worker/notes all exist and are protected. Navigation between pages uses WorkerLayout with consistent bottom nav. Full authenticated testing would require valid Supabase credentials.

details: App.tsx imports WorkerHome, WorkerCheckIn, WorkerNotes correctly
WorkerLayout has bottom nav with all 5 tabs including Check In and Notes
Active tab highlighting uses location.pathname comparison
npx tsc --noEmit completed with exit code 0
